text:
待ってたぜ！
ゴツい車体と派手な塗装が
カオスな街の雰囲気にマッチしてたな！

ん？　戦い方は見てなかったのかって？
い、いやちゃんと見てたぜ！
すげー参考になったわ、マジで。

攻撃は多彩だけど
ちょいちょい隙もあるっぽいから
そこ狙ってきゃ楽勝だろ？

そろそろまた
討伐任務がありそうだから準備するわ。
サンキューな

Hey, about time! Nothing fits a chaotic city
better than tricked-out ride with a badass
paint job!

What? You say I wasn't even watching? Y-Yes,
I was! This was, uh, perfect reference material!
Yeah!

They've got lots of attacks, but they
sometimes leave themselves open.
All I gotta do is go for those openings
and boom! Easy win.

It's about time for another suppression
assignment, so I'd best get ready. Thanks!
